plugins.name: bark

plugins.name: graft
plugins.description: Jenkins plugin development with expert-level agents for implementing, reviewing, and testing plugins. Use whenever working on Jenkins hpi/jpi plugins, Pipeline steps, Jelly views, or preparing PRs for jenkinsci.

plugins.name: thorn
plugins.description: Local code review processing for localreview.nvim. Discovers, parses, and acts on review comments left as hidden .reviews.json files.

plugins.name: bloom
plugins.description: Terminal presentations with presenterm — brainstorm, structure, build, and review slide decks from the CLI
